title: Coomassie Blue Stain
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"57h24","text":"To visual total protein in a given sample","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Repeat steps 1-8 of the Western Blot protocol.
Once gels have finished running, cover gel with Coomassie Brilliant Blue, cover with lid, and incubate for 30 min
Add enough destain solution to cover the gel and leave overnight, gently shaking at room temperature
creator: Dalhousie Igem
